ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Enter your Todoist API token and click Connect.
ast.target: 输入您的 Todoist API 令牌，然后点击“连接”。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Set interval in seconds (minimum 20). Example: 300 = every 5 minutes. Click Apply to save.
ast.target: 设置间隔时间（秒）（最小值 20）。示例：300 = 每 5 分钟。点击“应用”保存。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: New tasks will be created in this project.
ast.target: 新任务将在此项目中创建。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Sync all tasks in vault, not just those with #todoist tag.
ast.target: 同步保险库中的所有任务，而不仅仅是带有 #todoist 标签的任务。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: When enabled, generated task links use todoist:// (desktop app). When disabled, links use https://app.todoist.com/app/task/... (web).
ast.target: 启用后，生成的任务链接使用 todoist://（桌面应用）。禁用后，链接使用 https://app.todoist.com/app/task/...（网页）。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: When a task is modified in both Obsidian and Todoist: todoist-wins overwrites Obsidian, obsidian-wins pushes Obsidian to Todoist, manual disables sync until resolved.
ast.target: 当任务在 Obsidian 和 Todoist 中均被修改时：todoist-wins 会覆盖 Obsidian，obsidian-wins 会将 Obsidian 推送到 Todoist，manual 会禁用同步直到问题解决。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Push changes from Obsidian to Todoist.
ast.target: 将 Obsidian 中的更改推送到 Todoist。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: ⚠️ Reverse sync (Todoist → Obsidian) currently has known bugs and is disabled by default. Enabling is NOT recommended.
ast.target: ⚠️ 反向同步（Todoist → Obsidian）目前存在已知错误，默认禁用。不建议启用。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Only the primary device pushes changes to Todoist. Secondary devices are read-only (sync disabled entirely).
ast.target: 仅主设备将更改推送到 Todoist。辅助设备为只读（完全禁用同步）。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Run a read-only health check across Vault, Todoist, and mapping (match-first). No data will be changed.
ast.target: 对保险库、Todoist 和映射（匹配优先）运行只读健康检查。不会更改任何数据。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Run safe auto-repair for eligible issues only: (A) repair missing/stale mapping when Vault and Todoist already match, (B) mark completed-in-Vault and confirmed-missing-in-Todoist tasks as nonActive. Then re-check and report what still needs manual handling.
ast.target: 仅对符合条件的问题运行安全自动修复：(A) 当保险库和 Todoist 已匹配时，修复缺失/过时的映射，(B) 将保险库中已完成且在 Todoist 中确认缺失的任务标记为非活动。然后重新检查并报告仍需手动处理的问题。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Open the task manager to manually resolve unresolved conflicts, stale links, and issue tasks that require decisions.
ast.target: 打开任务管理器，手动解决未解决的冲突、过时的链接以及需要决策的问题任务。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Log file modifications and sync operations.
ast.target: 记录文件修改和同步操作。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Output detailed logs to console for troubleshooting.
ast.target: 将详细日志输出到控制台以进行故障排除。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Browse, search and filter operation logs.
ast.target: 浏览、搜索和过滤操作日志。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Directory for plugin data storage. Click Apply to confirm and migrate existing data.
ast.target: 插件数据存储目录。点击“应用”确认并迁移现有数据。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Backup all Todoist data to vault.
ast.target: 将所有 Todoist 数据备份到保险库。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Reset all settings to defaults. WARNING: Will lose all task mappings!
ast.target: 将所有设置重置为默认值。警告：将丢失所有任务映射！

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: All folders are included in sync. Click Configure to exclude specific folders.
ast.target: 所有文件夹均包含在同步中。点击“配置”以排除特定文件夹。

ast.name: setName
ast.target: 使用应用 URI 方案

ast.name: setName
ast.target: 从同步中排除的文件夹

ast.name: setPlaceholder
ast.target: 输入您的 API 令牌

ast.name: warn
ast.source: TodoistApi constructor with baseUrl as second parameter is deprecated. Use options object instead: new TodoistApi(token, { baseUrl, customFetch })
ast.target: TodoistApi 构造函数将 baseUrl 作为第二个参数已弃用。请改用选项对象：new TodoistApi(token, { baseUrl, customFetch })

ast.name: warn
ast.source: [TodoistSyncAPI] sync_token expired, falling back to full sync
ast.target: [TodoistSyncAPI] sync_token 已过期，回退到完全同步

ast.name: warn
ast.source: [rebuildCache] Restoring backup mapping due to failure...
ast.target: [rebuildCache] 由于失败，正在恢复备份映射...

ast.name: warn
ast.target: [StoragePathManager] 追加操作进行中，正在跳过...

ast.name: warn
ast.target: [Settings] 发现临时文件，正在尝试恢复...

ast.name: warn
ast.target: [Settings] 设置已损坏，正在尝试恢复...

ast.name: warn
ast.target: [SettingsBackup] 没有可备份的设置数据

ast.name: warn
ast.source: [SyncLock] Sync lock acquire FAILED after 10s timeout
ast.target: [SyncLock] 同步锁获取在 10 秒超时后失败

ast.name: warn
ast.source: [SyncLock] Save lock acquire FAILED after 5s timeout
ast.target: [SyncLock] 保存锁获取在 5 秒超时后失败

ast.name: warn
ast.source: [SyncLock] Exclusive sync lock acquire FAILED after timeout
ast.target: [SyncLock] 排他性同步锁获取在超时后失败

ast.name: warn
ast.source: [Plugin] Skipping saveSettings on unload — load did not succeed
ast.target: [Plugin] 卸载时跳过 saveSettings — 加载未成功

ast.source: Required sync modules are not initialized.
ast.target: 所需的同步模块未初始化。

ast.name: Notice

ast.target: 链接修复在非主设备上被阻止。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Another sync is running. Please try again later.
ast.target: 另一个同步正在运行。请稍后再试。

ast.name: Notice
ast.target: 在 Todoist 中未找到任务。

ast.source: Conflict resolution is blocked on non-primary device.
ast.target: 冲突解决在非主设备上被阻止。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Task line not found in vault
ast.target: 在保险库中未找到任务行

ast.name: Notice

ast.target: 冲突已解决：保留了 Todoist 版本

ast.target: 任务删除在非主设备上被阻止。

ast.name: Notice

ast.target: 任务已在本地解除绑定，但 Todoist 删除失败。您可能需要在 Todoist 中手动删除它。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Failed to connect to Todoist. Please check your API token.
ast.target: 连接到 Todoist 失败。请检查您的 API 令牌。

ast.target: 请输入一个有效的数字。

ast.target: 同步间隔已更新并应用。

ast.source: Device ID not available yet. Please wait for plugin initialization.
ast.target: 设备 ID 尚不可用。请等待插件初始化。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: This device is now the primary device. Please reload the plugin to activate sync.
ast.target: 此设备现在是主设备。请重新加载插件以激活同步。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Please set the Todoist API first

ast.target: 同步锁管理器未初始化

ast.name: Notice
ast.source:
\u26A0\uFE0F Too Many Requests to Todoist!

Please wait 15 minutes before next sync.

Tip: Reduce sync frequency to avoid hitting rate limits.
ast.target:
\u26A0\uFE0F 对 Todoist 的请求过多！

请等待 15 分钟后再进行下次同步。

提示：降低同步频率以避免触发速率限制。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Todoist authentication failed (401). Please verify or refresh your API token.
ast.target: Todoist 认证失败 (401)。请验证或刷新您的 API 令牌。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Todoist access forbidden (403). Token or permission may be invalid. Please re-check Todoist authorization.
ast.target: Todoist 访问被禁止 (403)。令牌或权限可能无效。请重新检查 Todoist 授权。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Failed to write task ID to file. Todoist task rolled back. Please try again.
ast.target: 将任务 ID 写入文件失败。Todoist 任务已回滚。请重试。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Failed to create task. Check console for details.
ast.target: 创建任务失败。请检查控制台获取详情。

ast.name: Notice
ast.target: 发现未保存的更改，正在尝试恢复...

ast.target: 从未保存的更改中恢复失败，正在使用备份

ast.target: 从未保存的更改中恢复了设置

ast.target: 设置已损坏，正在尝试恢复...

ast.target: 设置似乎已损坏且恢复失败。插件已停止以避免覆盖 data.json。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Settings recovered from backup after load failure
ast.target: 加载失败后从备份中恢复了设置

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Settings load failed. Loaded defaults in memory only; original data was not overwritten.
ast.target: 设置加载失败。已将默认设置加载到内存中；原始数据未被覆盖。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Settings save failed, temp file preserved for recovery
ast.target: 设置保存失败，临时文件已保留以便恢复。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Backup file is corrupted, cannot restore
ast.target: 备份文件已损坏，无法恢复。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Failed to restore settings from backup

ast.name: Notice
ast.target: 设置已从临时文件恢复。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Settings failed to load. Please reload the ultimate todoist sync plugin.
ast.target: 设置加载失败。请重新加载 Ultimate Todoist Sync 插件。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Todoist Sync: Secondary device — sync disabled. Use settings to claim as primary.
ast.target: Todoist 同步：次要设备 — 同步已禁用。请使用设置将其设为主要设备。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Ultimate Todoist Sync plugin initialization failed, please check the todoist api
ast.target: Ultimate Todoist Sync 插件初始化失败，请检查 Todoist API。

ast.name: Notice
ast.target: 创建用户数据文件夹时出错。

ast.name: Notice

ast.target: Ultimate Todoist Sync 初始化成功。Todoist 数据已备份。

ast.name: Notice
ast.target: Ultimate Todoist Sync 加载成功。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Ultimate Todoist Sync loaded with startup sync warnings. Please check console logs.
ast.target: Ultimate Todoist Sync 加载时出现启动同步警告。请检查控制台日志。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Startup database check failed to reach Todoist. Please verify network/API status and try sync again.
ast.target: 启动数据库检查未能连接到 Todoist。请验证网络/API 状态并重试同步。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Please enter the correct Todoist API token
ast.target: 请输入正确的 Todoist API 令牌。

ast.name: message
ast.source: Expected http/s scheme when method is not GET.
ast.target: 当方法不是 GET 时，需要 http/s 协议。

ast.target: 无效的 vary 字段值。

ast.name: message
ast.source: Expected an http/s scheme when method is not GET
ast.target: 当方法不是 GET 时，需要 http/s 协议。

ast.source: Response body is locked or disturbed
ast.target: 响应体已锁定或已被干扰。

ast.name: message
ast.source: operation type does not match "delete" or "put"
ast.target: 操作类型与 \"delete\" 或 \"put\" 不匹配。

ast.target: delete 操作不应有关联的响应。

ast.target: put 操作应有关联的响应。

ast.name: message

ast.name: message
ast.source: Exactly one of itemId or projectId must be provided
ast.target: 必须提供 itemId 或 projectId 中的一个。

ast.name: name
ast.source: Set default project for todoist task in the current file
ast.target: 为当前文件中的 Todoist 任务设置默认项目。

ast.name: text
ast.source: Set default project for todoist tasks in the current file
ast.target: 为当前文件中的 Todoist 任务设置默认项目。

ast.name: text
ast.source: No logs match the current filter.
ast.target: 没有日志匹配当前筛选条件。

ast.name: text
ast.source: No problem tasks found. Everything is in sync.
ast.target: 未发现问题任务。一切均已同步。

ast.name: text

ast.target: 此任务当前处于活动状态，没有未解决的问题。

ast.name: text

ast.target: 所需的同步模块未初始化。

ast.name: text
ast.target: 从 Todoist 同步中排除文件夹。

ast.name: text
ast.source: Checked folders will be ignored — tasks inside them will not be synced with Todoist. Excluding a parent folder automatically excludes all its subfolders.
ast.target: 勾选的文件夹将被忽略 — 其中的任务不会与 Todoist 同步。排除父文件夹会自动排除其所有子文件夹。
